# holistics_data_schedule (Resource)

A Holistics data schedule (Dashboard or QueryReport delivered via email, Slack, SFTP, or Google Sheets).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Email delivery — daily report to a team distribution list.
resource "holistics_data_schedule" "daily_email" {
  source_type = "Dashboard"
  source_id   = 1234

  schedule = {
    repeat = "0 8 * * 1-5"
    paused = false
  }

  email_dest = {
    title      = "Daily KPI report"
    recipients = ["team@example.com"]
    options = {
      include_header     = true
      include_filters    = true
      attachment_formats = ["pdf"]
    }
  }
}

# Slack delivery — post a screenshot to a channel every Monday morning.
resource "holistics_data_schedule" "weekly_slack" {
  source_type = "Dashboard"
  source_id   = 1234

  schedule = {
    repeat = "0 9 * * 1"
    paused = false
  }

  slack_dest = {
    title = "Weekly review"
    slack_channels = [
      { id = "C123456", type = "channel" }
    ]
  }
}

# SFTP delivery — push a CSV export to a vendor every hour.
resource "holistics_data_schedule" "vendor_export" {
  source_type = "QueryReport"
  source_id   = 5678

  schedule = {
    repeat = "0 * * * *"
    paused = false
  }

  sftp_dest = {
    data_source_id = 12
    file_path      = "/exports/orders_{{date}}.csv"
    format         = "csv"
    include_header = true
    separator      = ","
  }
}

# Google Sheets delivery — sync to a shared sheet four times a day.
resource "holistics_data_schedule" "gsheet_sync" {
  source_type = "Dashboard"
  source_id   = 1234

  schedule = {
    repeat = "0 */6 * * *"
    paused = false
  }

  google_sheet_dest = {
    sheet_url   = "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/abc123/edit"
    sheet_title = "Daily KPIs"
  }
}

# Email subscription — opt-in distribution where users self-manage.
resource "holistics_data_schedule" "subscription" {
  source_type = "Dashboard"
  source_id   = 1234

  schedule = {
    repeat = "0 8 * * *"
    paused = false
  }

  email_subscription_dest = {
    recipients = ["analytics-digest@example.com"]
    options = {
      attachment_formats = ["pdf"]
    }
  }
}

# Region-filtered delivery — apply a dynamic filter preset before sending.
resource "holistics_data_schedule" "eu_team_report" {
  source_type = "Dashboard"
  source_id   = 1234

  schedule = {
    repeat = "0 8 * * *"
    paused = false
  }

  dynamic_filter_presets = [
    {
      dynamic_filter_id = "1001"
      preset_condition = {
        operator = "is"
        values   = ["EU"]
      }
    }
  ]

  email_dest = {
    recipients = ["eu-team@example.com"]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `schedule` (Attributes) When the schedule fires. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule))
- `source_id` (Number) ID of the Dashboard or QueryReport.
- `source_type` (String) Source object type. One of `Dashboard` or `QueryReport`.

### Optional

- `dynamic_filter_presets` (Attributes List) Dynamic filter presets applied before delivery. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets))
- `email_dest` (Attributes) Email destination. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_dest))
- `email_subscription_dest` (Attributes) Email subscription destination. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_subscription_dest))
- `google_sheet_dest` (Attributes) Google Sheets destination. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--google_sheet_dest))
- `sftp_dest` (Attributes) SFTP destination. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sftp_dest))
- `slack_dest` (Attributes) Slack destination. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--slack_dest))
- `title` (String) Schedule title. Defaults to the source title.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Data schedule ID.

<a id="nestedatt--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Required:

- `paused` (Boolean) Pause execution.
- `repeat` (String) Crontab expression (e.g. `0 4 * * *`).

Read-Only:

- `is_archived` (Boolean) True if paused because the source was archived.


<a id="nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_filter_presets`

Required:

- `dynamic_filter_id` (String) Dynamic filter ID (numeric or string).
- `preset_condition` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets--preset_condition))

Optional:

- `public_hidden` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets--preset_condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_filter_presets.preset_condition`

Required:

- `operator` (String)

Optional:

- `modifier` (String)
- `values` (List of String)



<a id="nestedatt--email_dest"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email_dest`

Required:

- `recipients` (List of String)

Optional:

- `options` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_dest--options))
- `title` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--email_dest--options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email_dest.options`

Optional:

- `attachment_formats` (List of String)
- `body_text` (String)
- `dont_send_when_empty` (Boolean)
- `include_filters` (Boolean)
- `include_header` (Boolean)
- `include_report_link` (Boolean)
- `preview` (Boolean)
- `selected_type` (String)
- `selected_values` (List of String)



<a id="nestedatt--email_subscription_dest"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email_subscription_dest`

Required:

- `recipients` (List of String)

Optional:

- `options` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_subscription_dest--options))
- `title` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--email_subscription_dest--options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email_subscription_dest.options`

Optional:

- `attachment_formats` (List of String)
- `body_text` (String)
- `dont_send_when_empty` (Boolean)
- `include_filters` (Boolean)
- `include_header` (Boolean)
- `include_report_link` (Boolean)
- `preview` (Boolean)
- `selected_type` (String)
- `selected_values` (List of String)



<a id="nestedatt--google_sheet_dest"></a>
### Nested Schema for `google_sheet_dest`

Required:

- `sheet_title` (String)
- `sheet_url` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--sftp_dest"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sftp_dest`

Required:

- `data_source_id` (Number)
- `file_path` (String)

Optional:

- `dashboard_widget_id` (String)
- `format` (String)
- `include_header` (Boolean)
- `separator` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--slack_dest"></a>
### Nested Schema for `slack_dest`

Required:

- `slack_channels` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--slack_dest--slack_channels))

Optional:

- `message` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--slack_dest--slack_channels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `slack_dest.slack_channels`

Optional:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Import a data schedule by its integer ID.
terraform import holistics_data_schedule.daily_kpi_email 5678
```
